title: Create: Bits 'n' Bobs
description: Decorative and mechanical additions to create!
body:
![BITS N BOBS Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3aa06c5056e6b7f40e5cc3af34426c7581b8105c.png)

Small, polished additions designed to integrate closely with Create.

## Feature list * Cogwheel based chain drives (Using chains on Create's cogwheels or flanged cogwheels) * Nixie tube variants (Nixie Board & Large Nixie Tube) * Chairs * Block-in-block headlamps * Girder struts * Ponderflat world preset * Weathered girder * Chain pulley variant * Tile stone palettes * Lightbulb & Brass lamp ## All features are configurable! Individual features can be disabled from the config, so you can customise the mod to your liking. Config also allows you to change balancing of certain mod values. ## Available Translations [Contribute on crowdin!](https://crowdin.oreostack.uk/) * Chinese Simplified (简体中文) * Portuguese (Português) * Brazilian Portuguese (Português do Brasil) * Russian (Русский) * Spanish (Español) * Turkish (Türkçe) * Ukrainian (Українська) * Mexican Spanish (Español de México) * Pirate English (Pirate Speak) ### Machine Translations Some common languages have reviewed machine translations in game, but are pending a human translator, we would be very grateful for contributions: * Polish (Polski) * French (Français) * French Canadian (Français (Canada)) * Swedish (Svenska) * Dutch (Nederlands) ## GLORY TO AZ TECH **_Created by Cake, Kipti, Astral and NormalGuy, shout mr mellz for chain drive algorithm help_** # Please use Modrinth ❤️ Unlike CurseForge, Modrinth shares more with creators, is open source and is a more community driven platform, notably, it has no ties we are uncomfortable with. Mods will continue to be on Curseforge, but a portion of our revenue goes towards Medical Aid for Palestinians.
